caption: A group of men walk along a paved outdoor path beside a brick building. Many of the men wear white traditional Indian clothing, while others wear jackets and trousers. Several men in uniforms walk beside the group. Across the sequence, the group moves forward, and the camera angle shifts, eventually showing a man in a white shirt and dark vest gesturing with his hands. The footage is framed as a news broadcast with a red and yellow "BREAKING" banner at the bottom. On-screen text includes the "NEWS 10 इंडिया" logo and the ticker "कांग्रेस चटपटाई, तेजस्वी की 'पिक्ट्चर' बाक़ी है". Small portrait photos and names appear on the sides, including "मुख्यमंत्री नीतीश कुमार", "डॉ. प्रेम कुमार", "विजय चौधरी", "डिप्टी CM", "सबरात चौधरी", and "विजय सिन्हा". A time stamp of "10:09 PM" and a "MAHARASHTRA" logo are also visible.
